title: Bare Bones 3D Doors
description: 3D Doors and Trapdoors add-on for the Bare Bones resource pack.
body:
##  Bare Bones 3D Doors and Trapdoors

Adds real 3D doors and trapdoors for the Bare Bones resource pack. They have full 3D models, new side textures with proper visible hinges and latching mechanism.

**This is an add-on for the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack, must be installed above it to achieve the intended look!**

Textures do not "jump" when doors open and close! You can see the difference in the galery, but more noticable in-game by using smooth door and trapdoor animations. Suggested mods:

[Fancy Door Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancy-door-animations) is the simplest, but fastest mod, highly recommended.

[Fancy World Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwa) is developing fast, adding different animation styles and more animated items with the cost of lower performance.

[Physics Mod Pro](https://www.patreon.com/c/Haubna/home) is an extended version of Physics Mod, you can download it from Haubna's Patreon page. This is in a completely different leage with plethora of other feauters, but also includes door and trapdoor animations.

Please let me know on my discord channel if you don't like something or found a bug.

## Credits

Door and trapdoor models are from [3D Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-default) resource pack by [GeForceLegend](https://modrinth.com/user/GeForceLegend), under [GPL-3.0-only](https://spdx.org/licenses/GPL-3.0-only).
All textures were developed by myself, also [GPL-3.0-only](https://spdx.org/licenses/GPL-3.0-only).
